    91	    :   directDeclarator
    92	    ;
    93	
    94	directDeclarator
    95	    :   Identifier
    96	    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket
    97	    |   directDeclarator LeftParen parameterTypeList? RightParen
    98	    ;
    99	
   100	parameterTypeList
   101	    :   parameterList
   102	    ;
   103	
   104	parameterList
   105	    :   parameterDeclaration (Comma parameterDeclaration)*
   106	    ;
   107	
   108	parameterDeclaration
   109	    :   declarationSpecifiers declarator
   110	    ;
   111	
   112	identifierList
   113	    :   Identifier (Comma Identifier)*
   114	    ;
   115	
Review the changes and make sure they are as expected. Edit the file again if necessary.
